login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your iRoly account to continue coloring.
login.error: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join 200,000+ colorists and start your quiet hour.
register.name: Full name
register.terms: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
register.error: Could not create account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: We sent a password reset link to {email}. It may take a minute to arrive.
forgotPassword.error: Could not send reset email. Please check the address and try again.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.error: Could not reset password. The link may have expired.
